ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_iso2" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter code for the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the title belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the title was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the title */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the title's thumbnail image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the title's trailer video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_titles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the season was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the season */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the season's thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES content_titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_name" TEXT /* Name of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode in the season */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the episode */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the episode's thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being ranked */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the title is being ranked */,
  "week" TEXT /* Date of the week */,
  "weekly_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the title for that week */,
  "views" TEXT /* Number of views the title received in the week */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on user interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_rankings_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES content_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_rankings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the title */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Watch time for the engagement event */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for engagement */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of user interaction (e.g., watch, like, comment) */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES content_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, marketer, data analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "interests" TEXT /* User's interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., phone, tablet, smart TV) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the device */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage event */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Watch time for the usage event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device was used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_playback" (
  "playback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playback event */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user playing the title */,
  "playback_date" TEXT /* Date of the playback event */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Watch time for the playback event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for playback */,
  "playback_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the playback (e.g., HD, SD) */,
  "playback_method" TEXT /* Method of playback (e.g., streaming, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_playback_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES content_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_playback_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_playback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of the search event */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the search query */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search query in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being recommended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES content_titles ("title_id")
)
